chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6088 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.25777/2021 2. For hearing of main case 14.04.2025 Messrs. Abdul Rahim Lakhani, Sumeed Ali Memon and Atta Muhammad Qureshi, advocates for the petitioner Syed Shafqat Ali Shah Masoomi, advocate for respondent along with Mr. Tariq Hussain Shaikh, Commissioner I.R. Zone-III, LTO, Karachi and Mr. Zubair Bilal, Chief Commissioner, I.R. LTO Karachi Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Pursuant to last order Mr. Tariq Hussain Shaikh, Commissioner I.R. Zone-III, LTO, Karachi and Mr. Zubair Bilal, Chief Commissioner, I.R. LTO Karachi, are present and states that the present lis is squarely covered by a Division Bench judgment of this Court reported as 2023 PTD 576, therefore, may be disposed of in mutatis mutandis application of the same reasoning and upon the same terms. Order accordingly. The presence and assistance of learned officers is appreciated. Judge Judge Amjad
